summary: Comprehensive testing of Worker Mobile MVP completed. Core functionality working excellent with JWT auth, clock-in/out flow, double clock-in prevention, real-time timer, and mobile-first design. Fixed critical backend issues with branch_id validation and frontend IndexedDB compatibility.

critical_bugs.issue: TimeEntryResponse.branch_id required field but users can have null branch_id
Duplicate key error on employee_id unique index when multiple users register without employee_id

integration_issues.issue: IDBKeyRange.only() compatibility warnings in browser console

design_issues.issue: GPS permission denied messages in automation testing (expected)

passed_tests: User login via POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token
GET /api/auth/me returns user info with valid token
Double clock-in prevention - returns 409 conflict correctly
POST /api/attendance/clock-out completes time entry and calculates hours
Clock-out button appears after successful clock-in
Large button navigation (max 2 taps to clock)
